title: Airtable Record Search node returns no output data
symptom: The Airtable Record Search node stops execution and displays 'No output data returned', preventing the workflow from reaching the IF node.
root_cause: The Airtable Record Search node may not return any results if the search criteria do not match any records. By default, if no data is found, the node does not output any data, which halts the workflow.
fix_steps: Open the Airtable Record Search node settings
agent_instruction: Enable 'Always Output Data' in the Airtable Record Search node settings.
